transformed_query: WITH pts AS (SELECT t.dimension_code AS ticker, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM dp.time) AS yr, dp.value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.dimension_code, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM dp.time), CASE WHEN dp.series_id LIKE '%_revenue_ex_tax_%' THEN 1 WHEN dp.series_id LIKE '%_revenue_inc_tax_%' THEN 3 ELSE 2 END ORDER BY dp.time DESC) AS rn, CASE WHEN dp.series_id LIKE '%_revenue_ex_tax_%' THEN 1 WHEN dp.series_id LIKE '%_revenue_inc_tax_%' THEN 3 ELSE 2 END AS pref, dp.series_id FROM data_points AS dp JOIN dimensions AS t ON t.series_id = dp.series_id AND t.dimension_type = 'ticker' AND t.dimension_code IN ('ETN', 'ROK', 'GE', 'EMR', 'WAB', 'TT', 'GLW', 'FAST', 'WCC', 'VRT', 'HON', 'JCI', 'CMI', 'PCAR', 'DE', 'OTIS', 'CARR', 'COHR', 'FN', 'LITE', 'AME', 'WTS', 'FLS', 'CR', 'ITT', 'LII', 'DHR', 'IR', 'IEX', 'CAT', 'ALLE', 'AMAT', 'KLAC', 'RTX', 'HWM', 'TDG', 'WWD') JOIN dimensions AS m ON m.series_id = dp.series_id AND m.dimension_type = 'metric_code' AND m.dimension_code IN ('revenue', 'revenue_ex_tax') WHERE dp.series_id IN (SELECT series_id FROM series WHERE series_id LIKE '%consolidated_annual') AND dp.time >= '2019-06-01'), best AS (SELECT ticker, yr, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker, yr ORDER BY pref, rn) AS brn FROM pts WHERE rn = 1) SELECT ticker, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2020 AND brn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2020, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2021 AND brn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2021, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2022 AND brn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2022, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2023 AND brn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2023, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2024 AND brn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2024, MAX(CASE WHEN yr = 2025 AND brn = 1 THEN value END) AS y2025 FROM best GROUP BY ticker ORDER BY ticker
